description: Wisdom rules seeded at genre-proposal time from a successful reflection. Expected to be curated + extended via future LEARN.5 wisdom-rule proposals as sessions in this genre accumulate.

rules.rule: Fruits must be launched in random arcs to keep players engaged and challenged.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Slicing a bomb should result in an immediate game over to maintain tension.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: A combo multiplier should be applied when slicing 3 or more fruits in a single swipe.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: The game should be timed, typically with a 60-second countdown to encourage quick decision-making.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: The best score should be saved across sessions to motivate players to improve.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre
